queue.task: Evening session: review day, plan depth work for remaining 2 hours
queue.summary: Reviewed day state: 200+ tasks, 17 bugs, parser divergence is top priority debt. Queue correct: parser unification then HenryDB persistence depth.

queue.goal: Parser unification: merge diverged root and WASM Monkey-lang parsers
queue.summary: Analyzed divergence: root parser has switch/fstring/null but compiler lacks them (12 failing parity tests). WASM project has 1535/1540 tests. Plan: add 3 missing compilations to root compiler. fill applied 3 BUILD tasks.

queue.task: Add SwitchExpression compilation to root compiler+VM (4 parity tests)
queue.summary: Switch expression compiled in VM: value form + condition form. Fixed parser (brace-optional case bodies), fixed evaluator (condition-form truthiness). 4/4 parity tests pass, 600/608 total.

queue.task: Add FStringExpression compilation to root compiler+VM (5 parity tests)
queue.summary: F-string compilation: text segments as constants, expression segments via str() builtin + OpAdd concatenation. 5/5 parity tests pass.

queue.task: Add NullLiteral compilation to root compiler+VM (3 parity tests)
queue.summary: NullLiteral compilation: OpNull. Root tests now 608/608 (0 failures). All parity tests passing for switch, f-strings, null, constant folding, HOFs.

queue.task: Housekeeping
queue.summary: Housekeeping: git push, daily log, CURRENT.md updated.

queue.task: Reflect on parser unification, plan next depth work
queue.summary: Reflected: 2 bugs found (condition-form switch, brace-optional parser). Key insight: BlockStatement vs raw expression compilation pattern. Parser divergence still exists but root is clean at 608/608. Pivot to HenryDB depth.

queue.goal: HenryDB depth: stress-test new features with persistence round-trips
queue.summary: Planned: persistence round-trips for sequences/SERIAL and materialized views, plus adversarial stress testing. Expression indexes, generated columns, FKs already covered.

queue.task: Add persistence round-trip tests for sequences/SERIAL
queue.summary: Found+fixed persistence bug: sequences, materialized views, comments were silently lost on save/restore. Added serialize/fromSerialized for all three. 5 round-trip tests pass.

queue.task: Add persistence round-trip tests for materialized views
queue.summary: Already done in T7.

queue.task: Stress-test HenryDB: adversarial query patterns that exercise persistence
queue.summary: Found+fixed table-level composite PRIMARY KEY parser bug. Added table-level UNIQUE, FOREIGN KEY support. 5 adversarial persistence stress tests: 10-table schema, double round-trip, FK+SERIAL+INSERT, mat view mutation, CTE+window.

queue.task: Final housekeeping + push
queue.summary: Git pushed all repos. Workspace synced.

queue.task: Depth check: 5 BUILD tasks done. Any surprises?
queue.summary: Depth check PASS: 4 bugs found, genuine surprises (composite PK parser, persistence data loss). Not in breadth spiral. Continue.

queue.task: HenryDB: write composite PK comprehensive tests (multi-column PKs with SERIAL, FKs, JOINs)
queue.summary: Composite PK: full support with uniqueness enforcement. Found+fixed query correctness bug (individual indexes on composite PK columns returned wrong results). 8 tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: run full test suite sweep — find regressions from parser changes
queue.summary: Full test sweep: 781 tests across joins, e2e, SQL, selects, subqueries, windows, CTEs, aggregates, indexes. 0 regressions from parser changes. 5 pre-existing failures (2 missing pg package, 3 window ROW_NUMBER bug).

queue.task: Monkey: port break/continue to VM compiler (currently evaluator-only)
queue.summary: Break/continue already implemented in VM compiler (loopStack with breakJumps and continueTarget). Verified with parity tests: both produce correct results. Root uses set-syntax not for-in.

queue.task: HenryDB: FILTER clause for aggregates (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE x > 5))
queue.summary: FILTER clause for aggregates: parser + executor for both standalone and GROUP BY paths. 7 tests (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX with FILTER, GROUP BY, edge cases).

queue.task: Housekeeping
queue.summary: Housekeeping: daily log updated, git pushed all repos.

queue.task: HenryDB: fix pre-existing window function ROW_NUMBER() bug
queue.summary: Fixed window function output ordering: rows now sorted by window ORDER BY (matching PostgreSQL). Fixed 3 pre-existing test failures (ROW_NUMBER, window+WHERE). 116/117 pass (1 is pg pkg).

queue.task: HenryDB: LATERAL JOIN support (FROM t1, LATERAL (SELECT ... WHERE t1.col = ...))
queue.summary: LATERAL JOIN already fully implemented: parser (LATERAL keyword, CROSS APPLY, OUTER APPLY) + executor (correlated subquery with _outerRow). Verified with top-N per group pattern.

queue.task: Monkey: port ternary operator to root parser+compiler
queue.summary: Ternary expression compilation: condition ? consequence : alternative using JumpNotTruthy+Jump pattern. AST, parser, evaluator already existed — only compiler was missing. 5/5 parity tests, 608/608 full suite.

queue.task: Final session housekeeping
queue.summary: Housekeeping: git synced.

queue.task: HenryDB: GROUPING SETS support (extension of GROUP BY ROLLUP/CUBE)
queue.summary: GROUPING SETS, ROLLUP, CUBE all already implemented and working. Verified with test queries.

queue.task: Monkey: port range expression (1..10) to root parser+evaluator+compiler
queue.summary: Range expression (a..b) compiled in VM via __range_inclusive builtin. Forward and reverse ranges. Handles InfixExpression with .. operator. 6 parity tests, 608/608 full suite.

queue.task: Session end housekeeping
queue.summary: Quick housekeeping.

queue.task: Depth check: 10 BUILD tasks. Evaluate breadth vs depth.
queue.summary: Depth check PASS: 6 bugs found, high learning rate. Composite PK correctness, persistence data loss, window ordering — all genuine depth work.

queue.task: HenryDB: EXPLAIN ANALYZE (show actual row counts and timing)
queue.summary: EXPLAIN ANALYZE already fully implemented: timing, I/O stats (heap scans, buffer reads, index lookups), row counts, plan tree builder. Verified with GROUP BY query.

queue.task: Monkey: port enum statement to root parser+evaluator+compiler
queue.summary: Enum statement ported: parser, evaluator (MonkeyEnum), compiler (hash of strings). Fixed 3 bugs: dot property access was function-calling, MonkeyHash.inspect() crashed in VM, SymbolScopes case mismatch. 608/608 tests.

queue.task: Session end: final log + push
queue.summary: Quick mid-session housekeeping.

queue.task: HenryDB: TABLESAMPLE SYSTEM/BERNOULLI (random sample of table)
queue.summary: TABLESAMPLE BERNOULLI/SYSTEM already implemented. Parser + executor with random percentage filtering. Verified with 1000-row table: 10% → ~96 rows, 50% → ~492 rows.

queue.task: Monkey: port import statement to root parser+evaluator
queue.summary: Skipped: import requires full module system (multi-session project). Replaced with compound assignment.

queue.task: Final session close
queue.summary: Mid-session housekeeping.

queue.task: Monkey: add postfix operators (x++, x--) to root parser+evaluator+compiler
queue.summary: Postfix ++/--: lexer tokens, parser desugaring to set x = x ± 1. Works in both evaluator and VM. 3 parity tests, 608/608 full suite.

queue.task: Monkey: add compound assignment (+=, -=, *=, /=) to root
queue.summary: Compound assignment (+=, -=, *=, /=) already fully implemented in lexer, parser, evaluator, and compiler. 5 parity tests confirm. Also works with strings (+=).

queue.task: Monkey: add optional chaining operator (?.) to root
queue.summary: Optional chaining (?.): lexer token, parser (obj?.prop + obj?.[key]), evaluator (null propagation), compiler (null-check with jump). 2 parity tests, 608/608.

queue.task: HenryDB: RETURNING clause for INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE
queue.summary: RETURNING clause already fully implemented for INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE. Supports * and column lists. Verified.

queue.task: Final session close: log + push
queue.summary: Deferred, more work to do.

queue.task: Monkey: add arrow functions (x => x + 1) to root parser+evaluator+compiler
queue.summary: Arrow functions: single-param (x => expr) in parseIdentifier prefix position. Avoids conflict with match expression. 608/608 tests.

queue.task: Monkey: compile match expression in VM
queue.summary: Match expression compiled in VM: chained equality comparisons with default arm. Same pattern as switch. 4 parity tests, 608/608.

queue.task: Log and push session results
queue.summary: Daily log updated with full session results. All repos pushed.

queue.task: Monkey: add for-in loop compilation to VM (for (let x in array) { body })
queue.summary: For-in loop already fully implemented in VM compiler. Root uses for (x in ...) syntax (no let). 3 parity tests pass.

queue.task: Session close: update daily log evening summary
